subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath been named 'Abdu'llah, that he may be mindful of the remembrance of the All-Merciful and guide the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی سمی بعبدالله لیکون متذکرا بذکر الرحمن و یهدی اهل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
